strap: Derry Digital draws £308m of UKRI lead-led funding across 238 grants, anchored by Queen'S University Belfast (45%), with Dell Technologies and Allstate on the industrial side. 9 Companies House-traced spin-outs translate to £34m UKRI per spin-out.
behaviour: The cluster shows medium-confidence "Stabilising around incumbents" and "Re-proving instead of narrowing" behaviour — repeated infrastructure commitments reinforce incumbent positions rather than redirecting capability toward new anchors or sub-domain specialisms.
